title: Slovakian Mincemeat Tart
description: A traditional Slovakian dessert featuring a flaky crust filled with sweet and tangy mincemeat.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Gluten-free option: substitute with almond flour

instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, cold butter, and salt. Use a pastry blender or your fingers to work the butter into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges and press the dough into the corners of the pan.
In a separate bowl, mix together mincemeat, granulated sugar, egg, tart coconut flakes, and moist brown sugar.
Pour the mincemeat mixture into the tart shell.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Let cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before serving.
